SwitchBoard AI
Autonomous procurement and compliance layer for AI agent marketplaces.
SwitchBoard AI is an always-on buyer-operator and compliance layer that discovers marketplace sellers, runs paid micro-trials, scores output quality and trust signals, selects vendors, purchases finalized outputs, assembles buyer-ready deliverables, and exposes a human-readable audit trail - all autonomously.
Built in 22 hours at the Nevermined Autonomous Business Hackathon (March 2026, AWS Builder Loft, San Francisco).
Live: switchboardai.ayushojha.com
How It Works
Client request
ProcurePilot (buyer engine)
|--- discovers vendors in Nevermined marketplace
|--- runs paid micro-trials via x402 tokens
|--- scores quality, latency, trust
|--- selects winner (or falls back to in-house)
|--- assembles final deliverable
Delivered brief + full audit trail
Every step is metered, logged, and visible in the dashboard.
Architecture
SwitchBoard AI runs as an autonomous procurement and compliance layer with a 7-agent execution flow:
Discovery Agent finds candidate sellers and marketplace categories
Purchaser Agent acquires plans and runs paid vendor trials
Scorer Agent evaluates quality, freshness, latency, and cost-efficiency
Switcher Agent compares outcomes and selects the best supplier stack
Assembler Agent composes the final buyer-ready packet
DataForge Web executes structured extraction tasks
DataForge Search executes semantic research tasks
TrustScore sits across the flow as the governance and compliance overlay, while the dashboard exposes the human-readable audit layer for judges and operators.
One Docker container, five services under supervisord:
Service
Port
Role
Dashboard
8000
API gateway, React frontend, organizer surfaces
ProcurePilot
8001
Autonomous buyer engine and run control
DataForge Web
8002
Structured web extraction (seller)
DataForge Search
8003
Semantic research (seller)
TrustScore
8010
Trust scoring, disputes, refunds, reputation
Browser --> Dashboard (8000)
|--proxy--> ProcurePilot / Orchestrator
| |-- Discovery Agent
| |-- Purchaser Agent
| |-- Scorer Agent
| |-- Switcher Agent
| |-- Assembler Agent
| |-- executes --> DataForge Web / DataForge Search / External Sellers
|--proxy--> TrustScore (quality gates, disputes, refunds, compliance)
|--serve--> React frontend (demo, marketplace, ledger views)
Production Architecture Diagram
Download the architecture diagram with sponsor integrations (SVG)
What It Does
As a Seller
Sells fully assembled market research briefs via Nevermined
DataForge Web: structured extraction from any URL
DataForge Search: semantic research with citations
As a Buyer
Discovers and evaluates marketplace vendors autonomously
Runs budget-gated paid trials before committing
Switches vendors based on quality/cost/reliability scoring
Falls back to in-house capability when vendors fail
Trust & Governance
Pre-buy quality gates before final purchase
Post-buy output review before assembly
Dispute lifecycle: open, refund request, honor/deny
Full trust ledger per run with signed evidence
API Surfaces
Endpoint
Description
GET /health
Service health
GET /snapshot
Organizer summary (counters, trust economics)
GET /ledger
Human-readable transaction ledger
GET /timeline
Global event timeline
GET /vendors
Vendor scoring rows
GET /runs
Active and completed runs
POST /api/procurepilot/procure
Submit a procurement request
POST /api/dataforge-web/scrape
Web extraction (x402 payment required)
POST /api/dataforge-search/search
Research search (x402 payment required)
GET /api/trustscore/reputation
Vendor reputation data
POST /api/trustscore/disputes/open
Open a trust dispute
Nevermined Integration
All transactions flow through Nevermined infrastructure:
Plan registration: Each seller agent has a registered credit plan
x402 payments: Buyers get access tokens and attach them as payment-signature headers
Credit metering: Every API call burns credits from the buyer's purchased plan
Marketplace discovery: Agents are discoverable via Nevermined's shared marketplace
Registered Agents
Agent
Type
DataForge Web
Seller — web extraction
DataForge Search
Seller — semantic research
ProcurePilot
Seller — full procurement orchestration
Tech Stack
Backend: Python, FastAPI, supervisord
Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
Payments: Nevermined SDK (x402 protocol)
LLM: OpenAI (task decomposition, quality scoring)
Data: Exa (search), Apify (web scraping)
Deploy: Docker, Coolify, Hostinger VPS
Local Development
# Clone
git clone https://github.com/Ayush10/switchboard-ai.git
cd switchboard-ai
# Create .env from example
cp env.production.example .env
# Fill in your API keys (NVM_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.)
# Build and run
docker build -t switchboard-ai .
docker run --env-file .env -p 8000:8000 -v $( pwd ) /storage:/app/storage switchboard-ai
The app will be available at http://localhost:8000 .
Project Structure
agents/
dashboard/ # API gateway + frontend serving
procure-pilot/ # Autonomous buyer engine
dataforge-web/ # Web extraction seller
dataforge-search/ # Search seller
orchestrator/ # Workflow orchestration
trustscore-api/ # Trust, disputes, refunds
storage/ # Runtime store utilities
frontend/ # React app (Vite + TypeScript)
scripts/ # Deployment and testing scripts
docs/ # Architecture docs and vendor analysis
License
MIT
About
No description, website, or topics provided.

| |-- Switcher Agent
| |-- Assembler Agent
| |-- executes --> DataForge Web / DataForge Search / External Sellers
|--proxy--> TrustScore (quality gates, disputes, refunds, compliance)
|--serve--> React frontend (demo, marketplace, ledger views)
Production Architecture Diagram
Download the architecture diagram with sponsor integrations (SVG)
What It Does
As a Seller
Sells fully assembled market research briefs via Nevermined
DataForge Web: structured extraction from any URL
DataForge Search: semantic research with citations
As a Buyer
Discovers and evaluates marketplace vendors autonomously
Runs budget-gated paid trials before committing
Switches vendors based on quality/cost/reliability scoring
Falls back to in-house capability when vendors fail
Trust & Governance
Pre-buy quality gates before final purchase
Post-buy output review before assembly
Dispute lifecycle: open, refund request, honor/deny
Full trust ledger per run with signed evidence
API Surfaces
Endpoint
Description
GET /health
Service health
GET /snapshot
Organizer summary (counters, trust economics)
GET /ledger
Human-readable transaction ledger
GET /timeline
Global event timeline
GET /vendors
Vendor scoring rows
GET /runs
Active and completed runs
POST /api/procurepilot/procure
Submit a procurement request
POST /api/dataforge-web/scrape
Web extraction (x402 payment required)
POST /api/dataforge-search/search
Research search (x402 payment required)
GET /api/trustscore/reputation
Vendor reputation data
POST /api/trustscore/disputes/open
Open a trust dispute
Nevermined Integration
All transactions flow through Nevermined infrastructure:
Plan registration: Each seller agent has a registered credit plan
x402 payments: Buyers get access tokens and attach them as payment-signature headers
Credit metering: Every API call burns credits from the buyer's purchased plan
Marketplace discovery: Agents are discoverable via Nevermined's shared marketplace
Registered Agents
Agent
Type
DataForge Web
Seller — web extraction
DataForge Search
Seller — semantic research
ProcurePilot
Seller — full procurement orchestration
Tech Stack
Backend: Python, FastAPI, supervisord
Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
Payments: Nevermined SDK (x402 protocol)
LLM: OpenAI (task decomposition, quality scoring)
Data: Exa (search), Apify (web scraping)
Deploy: Docker, Coolify, Hostinger VPS
Local Development
# Clone
git clone https://github.com/Ayush10/switchboard-ai.git
cd switchboard-ai
# Create .env from example
cp env.production.example .env
# Fill in your API keys (NVM_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.)
# Build and run
docker build -t switchboard-ai .
docker run --env-file .env -p 8000:8000 -v $( pwd ) /storage:/app/storage switchboard-ai
The app will be available at http://localhost:8000 .
Project Structure
agents/
dashboard/ # API gateway + frontend serving
procure-pilot/ # Autonomous buyer engine
dataforge-web/ # Web extraction seller
dataforge-search/ # Search seller
orchestrator/ # Workflow orchestration
trustscore-api/ # Trust, disputes, refunds
storage/ # Runtime store utilities
frontend/ # React app (Vite + TypeScript)
scripts/ # Deployment and testing scripts
docs/ # Architecture docs and vendor analysis
